{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Mage Corps
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Alazar]] has a [[Mage Corps]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
